Notice Of Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Sep-09-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Karen P. Shelar, Esq., SEDGWICK DETERT MORAN & ARNOLD, One Embarcadero Center, 16th Floor, San Francisco, CA 94111-3628, 415-781-7900, appearing for petitioner and moving party Investments Architects, Inc. Respondent did not appear.

There being no opposition the Court GRANTED Petitioner Investments Architects, Inc.'s et al.'s Petiion to confirm Arbitration Award. The order was signed in open Court. Honorable Ronald Evans Quidachay. Reported by Beldon Yee (302/REQ)
